full_text:
Yang Dao 羊衟
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Dao (羊衟)was born in Taishan. Helped Cai Yong escape the eunuchs and find safety in the south-east. Yang Dao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yang Dao lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
